title: Bridge Essay: Awareness of the passage of time and self-consciousness: What do meditators repo

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through Awareness, of, the, passage, of.

**Awareness of the passage of time and self-consciousness: What do meditators report?** — Psych J. PMID: 30740922. DOI: 10.1002/pchj.270. What do humans mean when they say that time passes quickly or slowly? In this article, we try to respond to this question on the basis of our studies on the judgment of the passage of time and its links with the judgment of physical durations. The awareness of the passage of time when consciousness is altered by meditation is also discussed. Adissociation is then made among the "self-time perspective," the "self-duration" (internal duration), and the "world-duration" (external duration). Alink
